differentials.name: Hemorrhage from rupture of splenic artery / abdominal aortic aneurysm
differentials.raw: Hemorrhage from rupture of splenic artery / abdominal aortic aneurysm

Hemorrhage from rupture of splenic arter: =  abrupt termination of colonic gas column at splenic flexure with decompression of the distal colon due to spasm + obstruction at the splenic flexure impinging on a paralytic transverse colon

context: =  abrupt termination of colonic gas column at splenic flexure with decompression of the distal colon due to spasm + obstruction at the splenic flexure impinging on a paralytic transverse colon
